welcome:
Hi, {name}! 👋

I'm an all-in-one video utility bot.

Send me a video and pick a feature 👇
not_subscribed: ❗️ To use the bot, please subscribe to these channels:
still_not_subscribed: ❌ You haven't subscribed to all channels yet
video_received: Video received. What would you like to do?
error_generic: ❌ Something went wrong. Please try again.
premium_required: 💎 This feature needs a premium conversion. Invite friends or buy premium.
batch_mode_on: 📦 Batch mode on. Send several videos, then type /done
maintenance: 🛠 Bot is temporarily down for maintenance
